title: WA Robot Agents Running Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot agents running'. Returns running-agent inventory keyed by pane plus the same inventory summary rollup.

running_agents.description: Running agent inventory keyed by pane_id string

summary.description: Rollup counts for the installed and running inventory

session_id.description: Agent session identifier if one was extracted

source.description: Source used to infer the running agent identity

summary.description: Aggregate counts for installed and running agent inventory

installed.description: Installed agents positively detected on disk

running.description: Running agents currently inferred from panes

configured.description: Installed agents with an associated configuration path

installed_but_idle.description: Installed agents not currently inferred as running
